title: Temporary bonds
doc_html:
§866.  Temporary bonds

Prior to the preparation of definitive bonds, the parish may, under the same restrictions as apply to definitive bonds, issue temporary bonds, with or without coupons, exchangeable for definitive bonds upon the issuance of the latter.
doc_text:
§866.  Temporary bonds
Prior to the preparation of definitive bonds, the parish may, under the same restrictions as apply to definitive bonds, issue temporary bonds, with or without coupons, exchangeable for definitive bonds upon the issuance of the latter.
